title: A-Cert terminal-certificate validation contract
description: Package-level extension for validating terminal certificates and leaf-totality in the branch tree. A-Cert extends the framework lemma-schema alphabet to operationalize the certificate alphabet C1-C5 specified in the structural exhaustion framework (branch_closure_methodology_extended.tex, certificate alphabet and leaf-totality).

schema.description: Required contract discriminator; it must be the literal `A-Cert`.

certificateClass.description: Required terminal class: C1 for a direct target certificate; C2 for a minimality/compression certificate; C3 for a routed defect certificate with a named consumer; C4 for a bounded-capacity certificate using an impossible ledger, budget, rank, tier, rate, or aggregate inequality via S-Comp; or C5 for a finite verified impossibility certificate with an audited table, enumeration procedure, verification theorem, and code hashes.

validationStatement.description: Required theorem asserting that the supplied witnesses and discharged contracts establish the selected terminal class for the current branch under its recorded assumptions.

informal.description: Required nonempty prose validation, naming the branch assumptions, witness, invoked result, and exact contradiction or terminal consequence.

latex.description: Optional LaTeX rendering of the certificate's concluding implication or contradiction.

formalLanguage.description: Optional name and version of the proof assistant or formal language used to validate the certificate.

formal.description: Optional machine-checkable theorem establishing the same terminal certificate.

witnessRefs.description: Required nonempty list of stable references to the typed objects that witness closure, such as a realized local test, admissible smaller replacement, exact identification, routed defect account, compared ledger or budget values, rank/tier data, aggregate inequality data, or finite survivor table.

items.description: One witness identifier resolving to a typed object in the current branch state.

requiredContractRefs.description: Required nonempty list of contract-instance identifiers whose successful discharge is necessary for this certificate, including relevant S-Prove, S-Def, S-Equiv, S-Dich, S-Pers, S-Det, S-Rout, S-Trig, S-Comp, S-Rest, S-Meas, A-Scope, or A-Admission obligations.

items.description: One stable reference to a validated supporting contract instance, not merely a contract class name.

auditRowRefs.description: Optional list of worksheet, dependency-table, branch-table, slack-table, defect-register, or proof-flow audit rows that record this terminal exit and its dependencies.

items.description: One stable audit-row identifier that resolves to the branch and certificate being validated.

evidence.description: Required nonempty list of framework results, calculations, ledger or slack worksheets, audited code, finite tables, verification theorems, audit records, or formal artifacts that verify the terminal conclusion.

items.description: One evidence record supporting certificate validity.

kind.description: Required evidence category from the fixed evidence-kind alphabet, selected to match the closure mechanism.

reference.description: Required nonempty locator for the terminal framework result, certificate record, ledger or budget worksheet, finite-table verification theorem, branch-tree row, audit record, or formal artifact.

hash.description: Optional integrity hash for version-sensitive code, tables, or formal certificate artifacts.

notes.description: Optional note explaining how the evidence and witnesses realize the selected certificate class.
